query: SELECT id, productCode, poNumber, batchNo, serialNumber, imei, productName, stationCode, productStatus, sheetRowNumber, archivedAt, createdAt, updatedAt FROM products WHERE batchNo = '01200000298' ORDER BY archivedAt IS NULL DESC, updatedAt DESC;
